hooks.command: node -e "let c='';try{c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.command||''}catch{};if(/db:reset|migrate\s+reset|push\s+\S.*(--force|\s-f\b)|push\s+(--force|-f)\b|reset\s+--hard/.test(c))console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'ask',permissionDecisionReason:'Risky command guard: destructive command - explicit approval required.'}}))"
